title: London
description: Vibrant, historic, and cosmopolitan capital blending centuries-old tradition with modern innovation. Motorbikes stream through the streets like rivers of motion, carrying locals past sidewalk cafes, street food stalls, and historic landmarks.

activities.name: Tower of London & Crown Jewels Tour
activities.description: Explore 1,000 years of royal history at one of the world's most famous fortresses and see the dazzling Crown Jewels.

activities.name: Borough Market Food Tour
activities.description: Taste your way through London's oldest and most renowned food market with a guided culinary tour.

activities.name: Thames River Cruise at Sunset
activities.description: Glide past Parliament, the London Eye, and Tower Bridge aboard a scenic evening river cruise.

title: Puerto Rico
description: Tropical island paradise with turquoise waters, colorful colonial towns, and white-sand beaches. From the bioluminescent bays to the cobblestone streets of Old San Juan, every corner pulses with vibrant culture and natural wonder.

activities.name: Bioluminescent Bay Kayak Tour
activities.description: Paddle through glowing waters in one of the brightest bioluminescent bays in the world.

activities.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
activities.description: Wander through 500 years of history along colorful cobblestone streets and Spanish colonial fortresses.

activities.name: El Yunque Rainforest Hike
activities.description: Trek through the only tropical rainforest in the U.S. National Forest system, with waterfalls and panoramic views.

title: Tokyo
description: A dazzling mix of ultra-modern skyscrapers, ancient temples, world-class cuisine, and neon-lit nightlife. From the serene Meiji Shrine to the electric buzz of Shibuya, Tokyo is a city of endless contrasts.

activities.name: Tsukiji Outer Market Food Tour
activities.description: Sample the freshest sushi, tamagoyaki, and street snacks at Tokyo's legendary seafood market.

activities.name: Meiji Shrine & Harajuku Walk
activities.description: Visit the peaceful Meiji Shrine nestled in a forested park, then explore Harajuku's vibrant fashion district.

activities.name: Shibuya Night Photography Tour
activities.description: Capture the neon-lit energy of Shibuya Crossing and the backstreets of Golden Gai with a local photographer.

title: Barcelona
description: Sun-drenched Mediterranean gem famous for stunning architecture, lively tapas bars, and golden beaches. Gaudi's whimsical masterpieces dot the skyline while vibrant neighbourhoods buzz with art, music, and flavour.

activities.name: Sagrada Familia Guided Tour
activities.description: Marvel at Gaudi's unfinished masterpiece with skip-the-line access and an expert guide.

activities.name: Gothic Quarter Tapas Crawl
activities.description: Wind through medieval alleyways tasting patatas bravas, jamón ibérico, and local cava at hidden gems.

activities.name: Barceloneta Beach & Sailing
activities.description: Relax on the iconic beach before setting sail along the Mediterranean coastline at golden hour.

title: Cape Town
description: Breathtaking coastal city nestled between mountains and ocean, offering diverse culture and natural beauty. Table Mountain towers over a landscape of vineyards, penguin colonies, and world-class surf breaks.

activities.name: Table Mountain Hike via Platteklip
activities.description: Summit the iconic flat-topped mountain for sweeping 360-degree views over the city and coastline.

activities.name: Cape Winelands Day Trip
activities.description: Tour the picturesque vineyards of Stellenbosch and Franschhoek with tastings at award-winning estates.

activities.name: Boulders Beach Penguin Visit
activities.description: Get up close with a colony of African penguins on a sheltered beach along the scenic Cape Peninsula.
